_comment: Template: register the antigravity TaskSolver-backed MCP server with agy. agy 1.0.16 reads ~/.gemini/config/mcp_config.json (schema {"mcpServers": {name: {command, args, env}}}). Replace <AGYHOOK> with the absolute path to this repo's antigravity/ dir and <TASKSOLVER> with the TaskSolver repo root. pyagy.config.write_mcp_config() generates this for you (rendering tools/context to a spec and pointing AGY_MCP_SPEC at it); this file is the manual equivalent.
